What I Do

Design services
built for impact.

Every project handled with full attention — brief to final file. No templates, no shortcuts.

🖼️
Thumbnail Design

High-CTR YouTube thumbnails using proven composition, bold typography, and colour psychology that make viewers click every time.

🎨
Brand Identity

Logos, colour systems, typography, and full brand guidelines that make your business instantly recognisable anywhere.

📱
Social Media Design

Feed posts, stories, reels covers, and ad creatives designed to stop the scroll and drive real engagement.

📦
Print & Packaging

Business cards, brochures, banners, and product packaging that look just as stunning in the real world.

About Me

Design is how I
think, not just work.

I'm Ahad Khan, an Indian graphic designer who uses the power of AI to create visuals that communicate powerfully and perform measurably. I specialise in YouTube thumbnail design that dramatically boosts click-through rates — because great design isn't just beautiful, it drives real results.

From building complete brand identities to crafting scroll-stopping social content, I've worked with content creators, startups, and established businesses across India and internationally. Every project I take on gets my full attention from the very first brief to the final delivered file.

AI-Powered Design Adobe Photoshop Illustrator Figma Canva Pro InDesign Thumbnail Design Brand Identity Social Media
Work with me ↗
How It Works

Simple process,
great results.

01
Discovery Call

We talk about your brand, audience, goals, and what success looks like for your project.

02
Strategy & Concepts

I develop design directions rooted in your brief — not random aesthetics or recycled templates.

03
Refine & Polish

We iterate together until the design feels exactly right. Your feedback shapes every revision.

04
Deliver & Support

Final files handed over in all formats you need, with ongoing support after delivery.
